pageContext.name: Batman (With Batarang)
pageContext.description: It's not just a signal; it's a warning. –Batman  Keep an eye out for the Bat-Signal! Focused on the early years of the Caped Crusader's rise of crime-fighting, DC's next blockbuster The Batman will offer the younger version of Batman who swore to take a stand against the forces of evil. To prepare fans for the movie's official release, Sideshow and Hot Toys presents a new series of Cosbaby that recreates your favorite characters as stylish displays! Each Cosbaby stands approximately 9–12.5cm tall with a rotatable head.  The Batman (with Batarang) Cosbaby Collectible Figure highlights Batman ready to throw his signature gadget!  Join the fight with The Batman Cosbaby DC collection!
